title: [perf] CA-QR/TSQR-first tall SVD route after compact-WY panel reject
description: Follow-up from frankenscipy-8l8r1.53. The true compact-WY left-panel private helper preserved deterministic/tolerance proof but failed same-worker RCH score gate on vmi1153651: sequential panel 31.722281 ms, compact-WY 35.640262 ms, speedup 0.890069x, max_abs_diff 3.21634274769166950e-10 <= 1.00634097256314577e-5; source restored, no linalg code kept. Current Golub-Kahan reducer anchor remains 1024x512 digest 0x90cdd3f8f71ed2c1 and public golden SHA 1cdd3658c6caef8dec9fc58fa7e12b8d5c90151e2f93df91ffe2fcf862c16225. Next primitive must be fundamentally different: communication-avoiding TSQR/CA-QR-first tall SVD route for tall full-rank matrices. Compute a stable tall-skinny QR/TSQR factorization in safe Rust, run the deterministic SVD on the small R factor, form U = Q * U_R, and accept only under strict reconstruction/orthogonality/rank/public-golden guards. Required: fresh RCH same-worker baseline first, one lever only, public golden SHA unchanged, ordering/tie/sign/rank contracts unchanged, no unsafe/C BLAS/MKL/XLA/thread fanout, target >=1.25x on profile-backed tall SVD/lstsq/pinv lane before public routing.

dependencies.title: [perf][no-gaps] Close ALL vs-upstream perf gaps in pure safe Rust — no C BLAS/LAPACK/XLA linkage
